name: cc-kiro-plugin
description: Agentic coding assistant powered by the direct Kiro CLI bridge. Use the command/skill path or kiro-coder for implementation; kiro-agent is read-only analysis.

requiresExternalTool.name: kiro-cli
requiresExternalTool.description: Kiro CLI - AI coding agent for the terminal

default_model.title: Default Kiro Model
default_model.description: Model identifier forwarded to kiro-cli chat --model when --model is not specified. Use `node scripts/kiro-bridge.js --list-models` to inspect available models. Leave empty to use Kiro's configured default.

default_effort.title: Default Kiro Effort
default_effort.description: Optional reasoning effort forwarded to kiro-cli chat --effort when supported: low, medium, high, xhigh, or max.

timeout.title: Default Timeout
timeout.description: Bridge silence timeout, for example 3m, 300s, or 5m0s.
